name: Apache Kafka + Kafka UI
description: A distributed event streaming platform for high-performance data pipelines and real-time analytics, bundled with Kafka UI for managing topics, consumer groups and messages from the browser.

aws.service: Amazon MSK (Managed Streaming for Apache Kafka)
aws.parity: Amazon MSK runs standard Apache Kafka — the same producer/consumer APIs, topic configuration and wire protocol work without modification.
aws.deploy: Create an MSK cluster and swap the bootstrap server address in your producers and consumers; no code changes required.

variables.label: Kafka Broker Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to reach the Kafka broker.

variables.label: Kafka UI Port
variables.description: Port on your host machine to access the Kafka UI web console.
